heading: Storm risk in Lorn — What Property Owners Need to Know

faq.question: How can I check storm risk risk for a specific property in Lorn?

faq.answer: Insurance premiums in Lorn can be influenced by storm risk risk. Higher-risk properties may face higher premiums or excesses. A full climate report includes insurance cost projections.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 4.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
